subject: A windswept mountain crag rising over a snowy plain dotted with weathered stone pillars or ruined columns, lit by warm dawn or sunset light
description: A jagged snow-streaked mountain peak dominates the background, its ridges catching warm gold-pink light from a low sun. The middle ground holds a cluster of weathered stone pillars or eroded standing columns rising from a flat snowy plain. The foreground is muted pale snow with subtle wind-scoured texture. The palette is cold blues and whites in shadow, contrasted with peach, salmon, and amber on the lit faces of the mountain. No figures are visible. Atmosphere is sparse, austere, and elemental — cold wind implied across an empty wilderness.
foreground: snow-covered plain with weathered stone pillars or ruined columns
background: snow-streaked mountain crag lit by low warm sun
emotion: austere stillness; the quiet of a vast cold place at dawn
